query: SELECT fd.projectId, c.name as consultant, fd.designType, fd.designValue, fd.supervisionType, fd.supervisionValue FROM financialData fd JOIN consultants c ON fd.consultantId = c.id WHERE fd.projectId = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT fd.projectId, c.name as consultant, fd.designType, fd.designValue, fd.supervisionType, fd.supervisionValue FROM financialData fd JOIN consultants c ON fd.consultantId = c.id WHERE fd.projectId = 1;
